name: Release Notes v3.12.3 - APIs
body:
Release Notes v3.12.3 - APIs

Release Date: 22-07-2020

In this release we've made a change to the eCommerce API - detailed below. For details on all changes refer to the POS and Back Office Release Notes. 

Resolutions

APIDetails
eCommerce APIThe Currency Multiplier now updates product prices exported through the eCommerce API
